<!-- indicator: fig-unemployed -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-unemployed
#| fig-cap: 'Percentage of Population Unemployed, 16 Years and Older, 2021-2023'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Percentage of Population Unemployed, 16 Years and Older, 2021-2023.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-unemployed", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
